channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th March
item.description:
Someone has dumped this furniture on the grass. Has been here for around 2 weeks. We are constantly getting stuff dumped on this estate even further down and noone cleans it including lack of care takers cleaning.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nightingale Vale, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass shelves and household waste flytipped, 11th March
item.description:
For the THIRD time reporting. There is a load of household wood waster from old cupboards etc. Flytipped behind the central bin areas on Clapton terrace. There is a glass shelves dumped that are a safety hazard. Please remove asap.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: River footpath, 11th March
item.description:
Please have this rubbish and three branches removed ASAP

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandhurst Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside 131 Eglinton Road, 11th March
item.description:
The occupants of this property have left mattresses and other rubbish on the pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eglinton Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle collision detritus, 11th March
item.description:
Appears vehicle has collided with a wall, parts of car smashed all over the pavement. Could cause harm

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Bohun Grove, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 11th March
item.description:
More flytipping, encouraged by the council who tell local residents to dump their goods in a corner, where children and parents walk to school, people with disabilities can trip over them and blind people wouldn't be able to see the mess! This is a health and safety hazard, which shouldn't be encouraged by the council and could lead to someone being injured!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rosedale Close, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Scooter, 11th March
item.description:
Dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Millfields Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Canisters in gutter, 11th March
item.description:
Cannisters

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Millfields Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping of plastic on pavement of Green Lane & Edward Road, 11th March
item.description:
Can you please clear? Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poo, 11th March
item.description:
Poo

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Millfields Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 110 High Holborn fire exit door at the back of the gymbox, 11th March
item.description:
Hi all, We would like to report that there is homeless that have blocked our fire exit door with various furnitures just at the back of the gymbox this is going on for months now and is. Is there anything we can do about this? The tenants are complaining about it and are concerned about access to the fire exit Please let me know if there is any action we can take to resolve this. thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Procter Street, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tip, 11th March
item.description:
Tip

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colenso Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden post laying on pavement, 11th March
item.description:
Trip hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Eden Park Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signpost on Pond Path leaning over, 11th March
item.description:
The sign on Pond Path opp 4 Green Lane has been knocked and is leaning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of rubbish and paint pot, 11th March
item.description:
A bag of rubbish and a pot of paint have been dumped on the public footpath between Great ElmsRoad and Wellington Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wellington Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very deep pothole, 11th March
item.description:
Potholes very deep, my van was touchig the road when it jumped into it. It needs to be sorted asap as its commercial road. Many potholes along the road just after speedbumps
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nobel Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in the property of Caroline terrace, 11th March
item.description:
Over the wall in the grounds of the social housing on Caroline terrace there is a large and growing pile of rubbish which is unhygienic and an isore.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public bin, 11th March
item.description:
Overflowing public bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaking from trees remains, 11th March
item.description:
The large tree outside number 10 sheds catkins twice a year causing a widespread mulch over the pavement and road The street cleaner small van thing came around recently but only did a straight line along the pavement and didn’t bother to clean surrounding areas or sweep the excess into the pathway of his truck so it could then be collected. Would it be possible to do a more thorough job and ensure the wider area is cleaned?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingswood Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bicycle chained to bike railing outside 30 Hartham Road N7, 11th March
item.description:
Abandoned rusty bicycle been here for 2 years chained to the bike parking post and not moved once. Please remove to free up the bike post and remove the obstruction as it is knocked about frequently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartham Road, Holloway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
